title: Dynamic Trees for Nature's Spirit
body:
[Dynamic Trees for Minecraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamictrees) | [Nature's Spirit](https://modrinth.com/mod/natures-spirit)

​                             

[![](https://i.imgur.com/0Prkr13.png)](https://discord.gg/A4FCBS3)



**Overview**
------------

This mod makes Nature's Spirit compatible with Dynamic Trees, adding dynamically growing versions of the twenty-three trees, and fully replacing them during world generation.  
The trees, their behaviour and their generation can be customized and tweaked through the use of Tree Packs.

 


**Features**
------------

#### **Currently Included Trees:**

*   Aspen
*   Cedar
*   Cypress
*   Fir
*   Blue Wisteria
*   Purple Wisteria
*   Pink Wisteria
*   White Wisteria
*   Orange Maple
*   Red Maple
*   Yellow Maple
*   Larch
*   Yellow Larch
*   Ghaf
*   Joshua
*   Mahogany
*   Olive
*   Palo Verde
*   Redwood
*   Saxaul
*   Sugi
*   Willow
*   Coconut



World Gen: This can be customized through Tree-Packs.

 

**Addtional:** The mod may not be perfect yet, please remember to back up your world. At the same time, you may have noticed that it requires so many prerequisites, please note that they **all need to be installed**.



**Requirements**
----------------

###### \- Forge (47.1.3 is recommended)

###### \- [Dynamic Trees for Minecraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamictrees)

###### \- [Forgified Fabric API](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/forgified-fabric-api "Forgified Fabric API")

###### \- [Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector)

###### \- [Connector Extras](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector-extras)

###### \- [TerraBlender](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrablender) (Need Forge Version)

###### \- [Nature's Spirit](https://modrinth.com/mod/natures-spirit)



 Credits
--------

Thanks to the Dynamic Trees community and Max Hyper, and to the Teacon community and Ωκεανος.
